honesty_note: Validated on a real 70/30 time-based train/test split of 5836 total 3-hour windows from GFZ Potsdam + NOAA data (July 2024 - July 2026). Production weights above are retrained on the FULL dataset for deployment; the 'validated_test_metrics' field reflects the honest held-out performance from the train-only version, not the production weights directly (standard practice: validate on a split, then retrain on everything for final deployment).
